title: Home Palliative Care
text:
Home Palliative Care - SupportGoWhere
Home Palliative Care
Share link
Support caregivers in caring for patients with life-limiting illnesses and prefers to spend their days at home.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Fees payable
Referral required
Collapse all sections
About this support

Provides patients and caregivers with:

Professional medical attention, social, emotional and spiritual support

Caregiver training

Equipment loan

Advance Care Planning

Care coordination

24/7 clinical services

Bereavement care

Who is this for?

Patient is:

Homebound due to an advanced, life-limiting illness that is diagnosed by a doctor

Diagnosed with life-limiting illness with prognosis less than 1 year

Singapore Citizen (SC), Permanent Resident (PR) or foreigner

What to expect?

The amount varies based on your household’s income.

Applicants for care services will need to fulfil the services’ eligibility criteria and providers’ service boundaries (if any), and enrolments are subject to availability of vacancies.

How to apply?

You will need to get a referral from a hospital, polyclinic or GP who is familiar with your loved ones’ condition and needs.

For further assistance, contact the Agency for Integrated Care (AIC) at 1800 650 6060, email enquiries@aic.sg or walk in to a nearby AIC Link.

You can visit AIC’s website to search for service providers by postal code, address or your device’s current location.

Information last updated on 24 Feb 2026
